title: Enhanced Stanford faculty profile with full CV
claim: Strengthen the Stanford chapter with comprehensive faculty profile data including full publication list and detailed honors.
desiredEvidence: Stanford faculty profile, CV, laboratory website with complete publication list
whyItMatters: This would provide authoritative institutional documentation of Santiago's entire Stanford career.
targetEffect: Upgrade from synthesized research to direct institutional documentation.
notes: Stanford faculty profiles typically provide comprehensive career documentation.

title: Direct academy election announcements
claim: Locate official NAE, AAAS, and NAI election announcements naming Juan Santiago.
desiredEvidence: Academy press releases, election announcements, member directories
whyItMatters: These represent the highest academic honors and should be documented with primary sources.
targetEffect: Move from synthesized claims to direct academy documentation.
notes: Academy websites typically publish annual election announcements.

title: Google Scholar profile and citation metrics
claim: Document publication record, h-index, and citation counts with direct Google Scholar data.
desiredEvidence: Google Scholar profile, publication database records
whyItMatters: Provides quantitative documentation of research impact and influence.
targetEffect: Add verifiable metrics to research impact claims.
notes: Most faculty maintain Google Scholar profiles with comprehensive publication data.

title: Documentation of former student placements
claim: Verify the 32 PhD students/postdocs and their current positions at universities and companies.
desiredEvidence: Laboratory alumni page, LinkedIn profiles, university faculty directories
whyItMatters: Demonstrates mentorship impact and academic lineage.
targetEffect: Document the multiplier effect of excellent mentorship.
notes: Laboratory websites often maintain alumni pages with placement information.

title: Patent database documentation
claim: Document the 60 issued patents and 27 licensed patents with patent database records.
desiredEvidence: USPTO records, Google Patents, university technology transfer records
whyItMatters: Provides concrete evidence of innovation impact and technology transfer.
targetEffect: Add verifiable documentation to innovation claims.
notes: Patent databases provide public records of issued patents and licensing status.
